zh.Henbury-cum-Pexall, Macclesfield, Cheshi: 英國爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Davenport於1375年出生在英國爾時，他的父親Thomas Davenport of Henbury11372歲，母親Margaret de Venables45歲。他於大約1402年與Margaret Bostock結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1415年8月23日在英國英格蘭爾亨波瑞享年40歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾。

zh-hans.Henbury-cum-Pexall, Macclesfield, Cheshi: 英国爾馬可萊斯費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Davenport于1375年出生在英国爾时，他的父亲Thomas Davenport of Henbury11372岁，母亲Margaret de Venables45岁。他于大约1402年与Margaret Bostock结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1415年8月23日在英国英格兰爾亨波瑞享年40岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Davenport was born in 1375, in Cheshire, England, his father, Thomas Davenport of Henbury, was 11372 and his mother, Margaret de Venables, was 45. He married Margaret Bostock about 1402. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 23 August 1415, in Henbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40, and was buried in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Davenport est né en 1375, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Davenport of Henbury, avait 11372 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Venables, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Bostock environ 1402. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 23 août 1415, à Henbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Davenport 1375 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Davenport of Henbury 11372 und seine Mutter Margaret de Venables 45. Er hat um 1402 Margaret Bostock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 23. August 1415 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Henbury, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Davenport è nato il nel 1375 nel Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Davenport of Henbury, aveva 11372 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Venables, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Bostock circa 1402. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 agosto 1415, nel Henbury, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Davenportが1375年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Davenport of Henburyは11372歳，母Margaret de Venablesは45歳であった。約1402年にMargaret Bostockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年8月23日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヘンブリーで40歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Davenport(이)가 1375년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Davenport of Henbury(은)는 11372세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Venables(은)는 45세였다. 그는 대략 1402년 Margaret Bostock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년 8월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 헨버이에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Davenport nasceu em 1375, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Davenport of Henbury, tinha 11372 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Venables, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Bostock aproximadamente 1402. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 23 de agosto de 1415, em Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Davenport родился в 1375 г. в местности чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Davenport of Henbury было 11372 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Venables, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Bostock около 1402 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 23 августа 1415 г. в местности хенбури, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Davenport nació en 1375, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Davenport of Henbury, tenía 11372 años y su mamá, Margaret de Venables, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Margaret Bostock aproximadamente 1402. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de agosto de 1415, en Henbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
